emails.subject: Enron/Hawaii I
emails.body: The docs are still coming can you meet Monday at 10 am? Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 10/27/2000 05:16 PM "MURIEL McFARLING" <MCFAM@andrews-kurth.com> 10/27/2000 04:32 PM

emails.subject: Re: Enron/Hawaii I
emails.body: Re: Enron/Hawaii I Actually, I can't. I just checked my calendar and I have a meeting at 10:00. How about before then? Angela D. Davis Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, Suite 3842 Houston, Texas 77002 Tele. (713) 345-8347 Fax: (713) 646-3393 e-mail: angela.davis@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Enron/Hawaii I
emails.body: Re: Enron/Hawaii I Sara, sorry I am clearly loosing it already. My meeting is not until tomorrow. So, 10:00 is fine. Angela D. Davis Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, Suite 3842 Houston, Texas 77002 Tele. (713) 345-8347 Fax: (713) 646-3393 e-mail: angela.davis@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Enron/Hawaii I
emails.body: If I finish my 9 am early, I'll call you. In any event, I'll find a way for us to hook up today or tomorrow. Sara Angela Davis@ENRON 10/30/2000 06:56 AM
